raw: SOP-003: High HTTP 500 Error Rate Investigation
message: SOP-003: High HTTP 500 Error Rate Investigation

raw: This SOP guides the investigation of sudden spikes in HTTP 500 Internal
message: This SOP guides the investigation of sudden spikes in HTTP 500 Internal

raw: Server Errors. A 500 error rate above 5% is P2; above 25% is P1.
message: Server Errors. A 500 error rate above 5% is P2; above 25% is P1.

raw: 500 errors indicate server-side failures and directly impact user experience.
message: 500 errors indicate server-side failures and directly impact user experience.

raw: Key Principle: Work from symptom → layer → component → root cause.
message: Key Principle: Work from symptom → layer → component → root cause.

raw: Do NOT restart services without first identifying the cause.
message: Do NOT restart services without first identifying the cause.

raw: P1 (Immediate): Error rate >25% OR >10,000 errors/min OR revenue impact
message: P1 (Immediate): Error rate >25% OR >10,000 errors/min OR revenue impact

raw: P2 (Urgent):    Error rate 5-25% OR specific critical endpoint affected
message: P2 (Urgent):    Error rate 5-25% OR specific critical endpoint affected

raw: P3 (Monitor):   Error rate 1-5% OR low-traffic endpoint only
message: P3 (Monitor):   Error rate 1-5% OR low-traffic endpoint only

raw: - Was there a deployment in the last 30 minutes?
message: - Was there a deployment in the last 30 minutes?

raw: - Any infrastructure changes? (scaling event, config change)
message: - Any infrastructure changes? (scaling event, config change)

raw: - Correlate with any external events (traffic spike, partner API issue)
message: - Correlate with any external events (traffic spike, partner API issue)

raw: - Which endpoints are affected? (Check by path in access logs)
message: - Which endpoints are affected? (Check by path in access logs)

raw: - Which services are generating the errors?
message: - Which services are generating the errors?

raw: - Are errors on all pods/instances or isolated?
message: - Are errors on all pods/instances or isolated?

raw: Command: grep "HTTP 500" /var/log/nginx/access.log | awk '{print $7}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
message: Command: grep "HTTP 500" /var/log/nginx/access.log | awk '{print $7}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn

message: - Config change: kubectl describe configmap app-config

message: → Action: Check new code diff, consider rollback

message: IF errors on all endpoints simultaneously:

message: → Likely: shared dependency failure (DB, cache, external API)

raw: → Action: Check DB connections, Redis, downstream services
message: → Action: Check DB connections, Redis, downstream services

message: IF errors on specific endpoint only:

message: → Likely: code bug or data-specific issue

raw: → Action: Check application logs for that endpoint
message: → Action: Check application logs for that endpoint

message: Root Cause: Null pointer / unhandled exception in new code

message: Evidence: Stack trace in error logs, started after deployment
